name: @string/jq_item_sunny_locket_name
description: A small silver locket bearing the royal crest. The clasp is engraved 'S — never let go.'

name: @string/jq_item_witch_letter_name
description: A pressed letter from the witch Morwenna confirming a young apprentice once trained at her hut.

name: @string/jq_item_stolen_wand_name
description: A slim wand that hums when held. The witch will be glad to have it back.

name: @string/jq_item_thief_token_name
description: A blackened iron coin. Marks its bearer as a friend of the city's quieter trades.

name: @string/jq_item_cloak_invis_name
description: A grey traveling cloak that drinks the light around it. Sunny once wore this.

name: @string/jq_item_lloth_ring_name
description: A black ring set with a pale spider. Whispered to bring its wearer home.

name: @string/jq_item_dragon_scale_name
description: A scale-shaped sigil bearing the marks of all twelve dragon courts.

name: @string/jq_item_tent_ring_name
description: A heavy braided ring etched with seven small moons. Sunny made this. Wear it to enter her tent.

name: @string/jq_item_rocket_silver_name
description: One ride to the Silver Moon.

name: @string/jq_item_rocket_crimson_name
description: One ride to the Crimson Moon.

name: @string/jq_item_rocket_azure_name
description: One ride to the Azure Moon.

name: @string/jq_item_rocket_gold_name
description: One ride to the Gold Moon.

name: @string/jq_item_rocket_emerald_name
description: One ride to the Emerald Moon.

name: @string/jq_item_rocket_violet_name
description: One ride to the Violet Moon.

name: @string/jq_item_rocket_pearl_name
description: One ride to the Pearl Moon.
